description_long: This object consists of five distinct bungalow-style residential buildings arranged in a row on a rectangular green base, resembling a small neighborhood block. Each bungalow features a low-pitched, hipped or gabled roof in muted brown tones, with visible overhangs and simple geometric forms. The buildings are spaced evenly apart, each with a small blue rectangular area in front, possibly representing driveways or walkways. The facades are primarily light blue with brown and white accents, and each bungalow appears to have a single story. The roofs and walls are rendered with clean, blocky shapes, and the overall scene is minimalistic, focusing on the architectural forms. The base is flat and green, simulating a grassy or landscaped area beneath the bungalows.
description: A group of five single-story bungalows with brown roofs and blue facades, arranged on a green rectangular base. Each bungalow is spaced apart and features simple, clean architectural lines.
description_view_0: Front view showing all five bungalows lined up side by side, highlighting their brown roofs and blue facades.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the depth of each bungalow and the blue rectangular areas in front of them.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the backs of the bungalows and the green base, with less detail on the facades.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the depth and arrangement of the bungalows with their roofs and blue front areas.
